# SimDesign ![](SimDesign-logo.png)

Structure for Organizing Monte Carlo Simulation Designs

## Installation

To install the latest stable version of the package from CRAN, please
use the following in your R console:

``` r
install.packages('SimDesign')
```

To install the Github version of the package with `remotes`, type the
following (assuming you have already installed the `remotes` package
from CRAN).

``` r
library('remotes')
install_github('philchalmers/SimDesign')
```

## Getting started

For a description pertaining to the philosophy and general workflow of
the package it is helpful to first read through the following:
[Chalmers, R. Philip, Adkins, Mark C. (2020) Writing Effective and
Reliable Monte Carlo Simulations with the SimDesign Package, The
Quantitative Methods for Psychology, 16(4), 248-280. doi:
10.20982/tqmp.16.4.p248](https://www.tqmp.org/RegularArticles/vol16-4/p248/index.html)

Coding examples found within this article range from relatively simple
(e.g., a re-implementation of one of [Hallgren’s (2013) simulation study
examples](https://www.tqmp.org/RegularArticles/vol09-2/p043/index.html),
as well as possible extensions to the simulation design) to more
advanced real-world simulation experiments (e.g., [Flora and Curran’s
(2004) simulation study](https://doi.org/10.1037/1082-989X.9.4.466)).
For additional information and instructions about how to use the package
please refer to the examples in the associated [Github
wiki](https://github.com/philchalmers/SimDesign/wiki).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Analyse()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Analyse.md)
  : Compute estimates and statistics

- [`AnalyseIf()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/AnalyseIf.md)
  :

  Perform a test that indicates whether a given
  [`Analyse()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Analyse.md)
  function should be executed

- [`Attach()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Attach.md)
  : Attach objects for easier reference

- [`BF_sim`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/BF_sim.md)
  : Example simulation from Brown and Forsythe (1974)

- [`BF_sim_alternative`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/BF_sim_alternative.md)
  : (Alternative) Example simulation from Brown and Forsythe (1974)

- [`Bradley1978()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Bradley1978.md)
  : Bradley's (1978) empirical robustness interval

- [`CC()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/CC.md) :
  Compute congruence coefficient

- [`ECR()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/ECR.md) :
  Compute empirical coverage rates

- [`EDR()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/EDR.md) :
  Compute the empirical detection/rejection rate for Type I errors and
  Power

- [`Generate()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Generate.md)
  : Generate data

- [`GenerateIf()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/GenerateIf.md)
  :

  Perform a test that indicates whether a given
  [`Generate()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Generate.md)
  function should be executed

- [`IRMSE()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/IRMSE.md)
  : Compute the integrated root mean-square error

- [`MAE()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/MAE.md) :
  Compute the mean absolute error

- [`MSRSE()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/MSRSE.md)
  : Compute the relative performance behavior of collections of standard
  errors

- [`PBA()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/PBA.md)
  [`print(`*`<PBA>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/PBA.md)
  [`plot(`*`<PBA>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/PBA.md)
  : Probabilistic Bisection Algorithm

- [`RAB()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RAB.md) :
  Compute the relative absolute bias of multiple estimators

- [`RD()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RD.md) :
  Compute the relative difference

- [`RE()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RE.md) :
  Compute the relative efficiency of multiple estimators

- [`RMSE()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RMSE.md)
  [`RMSD()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RMSE.md)
  : Compute the (normalized) root mean square error

- [`RSE()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RSE.md) :
  Compute the relative standard error ratio

- [`RobbinsMonro()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RobbinsMonro.md)
  [`print(`*`<RM>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RobbinsMonro.md)
  [`plot(`*`<RM>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/RobbinsMonro.md)
  : Robbins-Monro (1951) stochastic root-finding algorithm

- [`SFA()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SFA.md)
  [`print(`*`<SFA>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SFA.md)
  : Surrogate Function Approximation via the Generalized Linear Model

- [`Serlin2000()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Serlin2000.md)
  : Empirical detection robustness method suggested by Serlin (2000)

- [`SimAnova()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimAnova.md)
  : Decompose the simulation into ANOVA-based effects

- [`SimCheck()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimCheck.md)
  : Check for missing files in array simulations

- [`SimClean()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimClean.md)
  : Removes/cleans files and folders that have been saved

- [`SimCollect()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimCollect.md)
  [`aggregate_simulations()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimCollect.md)
  : Collapse separate simulation files into a single result

- [`SimDesign`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimDesign.md)
  [`SimDesign-package`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimDesign.md)
  : Structure for Organizing Monte Carlo Simulation Designs

- [`SimErrors()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimErrors.md)
  : Extract Simulation Errors

- [`SimExtract()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimExtract.md)
  : Extract extra information from SimDesign objects

- [`SimFunctions()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimFunctions.md)
  : Template-based generation of the Generate-Analyse-Summarise
  functions

- [`SimRead()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimRead.md)
  : Read simulation files

- [`SimResults()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimResults.md)
  : Read in saved simulation results

- [`SimShiny()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimShiny.md)
  : Generate a basic Monte Carlo simulation GUI template

- [`SimSolve()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimSolve.md)
  [`summary(`*`<SimSolve>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimSolve.md)
  [`plot(`*`<SimSolve>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimSolve.md)
  : One Dimensional Root (Zero) Finding in Simulation Experiments

- [`SimWarnings()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/SimWarnings.md)
  : Extract Simulation Warnings

- [`Summarise()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/Summarise.md)
  : Summarise simulated data using various population comparison
  statistics

- [`addMissing()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/addMissing.md)
  : Add missing values to a vector given a MCAR, MAR, or MNAR scheme

- [`bias()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/bias.md)
  : Compute (relative/standardized) bias summary statistic

- [`bootPredict()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/bootPredict.md)
  [`boot_predict()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/bootPredict.md)
  : Compute prediction estimates for the replication size using
  bootstrap MSE estimates

- [`clusterSetRNGSubStream()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/clusterSetRNGSubStream.md)
  : Set RNG sub-stream for Pierre L'Ecuyer's RngStreams

- [`colVars()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/colVars.md)
  [`colSDs()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/colVars.md)
  : Form Column Standard Deviation and Variances

- [`createDesign()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/createDesign.md)
  [`print(`*`<Design>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/createDesign.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<Design>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/createDesign.md)
  [`rbindDesign()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/createDesign.md)
  : Create the simulation design object

- [`descript()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/descript.md)
  [`get_descriptFuns()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/descript.md)
  : Compute univariate descriptive statistics

- [`expandDesign()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/expandDesign.md)
  : Expand the simulation design object for array computing

- [`expandReplications()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/expandReplications.md)
  :

  Expand the replications to match `expandDesign`

- [`genSeeds()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/genSeeds.md)
  [`gen_seeds()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/genSeeds.md)
  : Generate random seeds

- [`getArrayID()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/getArrayID.md)
  : Get job array ID (e.g., from SLURM or other HPC array distributions)

- [`listAvailableNotifiers()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/listAvailableNotifiers.md)
  : List All Available Notifiers

- [`manageMessages()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/manageMessages.md)
  : Increase the intensity or suppress the output of an observed message

- [`manageWarnings()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/manageWarnings.md)
  : Manage specific warning messages

- [`nc()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/nc.md) :
  Auto-named Concatenation of Vector or List

- [`new_PushbulletNotifier()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/new_PushbulletNotifier.md)
  : Create a Pushbullet Notifier

- [`new_TelegramNotifier()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/new_TelegramNotifier.md)
  : Create a Telegram Notifier

- [`quiet()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/quiet.md)
  : Suppress verbose function messages

- [`rHeadrick()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rHeadrick.md)
  : Generate non-normal data with Headrick's (2002) method

- [`rValeMaurelli()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rValeMaurelli.md)
  : Generate non-normal data with Vale & Maurelli's (1983) method

- [`rbind(`*`<SimDesign>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rbind.SimDesign.md)
  : Combine two separate SimDesign objects by row

- [`reSummarise()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/reSummarise.md)
  : Run a summarise step for results that have been saved to the hard
  drive

- [`rejectionSampling()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rejectionSampling.md)
  : Rejection sampling (i.e., accept-reject method)

- [`rint()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rint.md)
  : Generate integer values within specified range

- [`rinvWishart()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rinvWishart.md)
  : Generate data with the inverse Wishart distribution

- [`rmgh()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rmgh.md)
  : Generate data with the multivariate g-and-h distribution

- [`rmvnorm()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rmvnorm.md)
  : Generate data with the multivariate normal (i.e., Gaussian)
  distribution

- [`rmvt()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rmvt.md)
  : Generate data with the multivariate t distribution

- [`rtruncate()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/rtruncate.md)
  : Generate a random set of values within a truncated range

- [`runArraySimulation()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/runArraySimulation.md)
  : Run a Monte Carlo simulation using array job submissions per
  condition

- [`runSimulation()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/runSimulation.md)
  [`summary(`*`<SimDesign>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/runSimulation.md)
  [`print(`*`<SimDesign>`*`)`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/runSimulation.md)
  : Run a Monte Carlo simulation given conditions and simulation
  functions

- [`timeFormater()`](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/reference/timeFormater.md)
  : Format time string to suitable numeric output

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Managing warning and error
  messages](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/Catch_errors.md):
- [Exporting objects and functions from the
  workspace](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/Fixed_obj_fun.md):
- [Distributing jobs for high-performance computing (HPC) clusters
  (e.g., via
  Slurm)](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/HPC-computing.md):
- [Multiple analysis
  functions](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/MultipleAnalyses.md):
- [Parallel computing
  information](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/Parallel-computing.md):
- [Saving simulation results and
  state](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/Saving-results.md):
- [Introduction to the SimDesign
  package](http://philchalmers.github.io/SimDesign/articles/SimDesign-intro.md):
